title: Labor Standards and Practices - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Labor Standards and Practices 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE BUREAU OF LABOR AND INDUSTRIES WAGE AND HOUR DIVISION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Enforces laws covering state minimum wage and overtime requirements, working conditions, child labor, farm and forest labor contracting, and wage collection. Enforces the payment of wage rates required to be paid to construction workers on public works projects and determines the wage rates based on an annual construction industry survey. 1800 SW 1st Avenue Suite 500 Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Job complaint must have occurred in Oregon Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (971) 245-3844 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE BUREAU OF LABOR AND INDUSTRIES WAGE AND HOUR DIVISION
